svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Codex" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="career-aware-recommender" name="Career-Aware Recommender Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="3165" dy="1109" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=24;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#3B1D25;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Career-Aware Educational Content Recommendation System" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="880" x="260" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dataGroup" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#7B1E31;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#3B1D25;" value="Project Data" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="360" width="237" x="92.25" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="resourceData" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#C8949D;fontSize=13;fontColor=#222222;" value="Learning Resources CSV
provider, skills, difficulty, prerequisites, quality" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="112.25" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="skillMap" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#C8949D;fontSize=13;fontColor=#222222;" value="Career Skill Map CSV
Data Analyst, ML Engineer, Software Developer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="112.25" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="profiles" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#C8949D;fontSize=13;fontColor=#222222;" value="Learner Profiles CSV
current skills, weak skills, completed topics, preferences" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="112.25" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sourceEvidence" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#D3A83F;fontSize=13;fontColor=#222222;" value="External Source Evidence
Coursera, DataCamp, freeCodeCamp, skill sources" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="241.5" x="90" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="logicGroup" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#2D5D7B;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#17364A;" value="Recommender Logic" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="480" width="390" x="428" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loadData" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#82AFC8;fontSize=14;fontColor=#222222;" value="Load Structured Data" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="210" x="518" y="145" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="skillGap" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#82AFC8;fontSize=14;fontColor=#222222;" value="Calculate Skill Gaps
pathway requirement - learner level" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="210" x="518" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="models" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#82AFC8;fontSize=14;fontColor=#222222;" value="Rank Resources
popularity baseline
content-based model
hybrid model" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="210" x="518" y="385" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="stagePath" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#82AFC8;fontSize=14;fontColor=#222222;" value="Build Staged Learning Path
learn just enough, project, deepen later, optional tracks" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="210" x="518" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="interfaceGroup" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#3C7A3F;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1D3B1E;" value="Prototype Interface" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="280" width="250" x="850" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="learnerView" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#8AB98C;fontSize=13;fontColor=#222222;" value="Learner View
profile, skill gaps, recommendations, completion checkboxes" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="210" x="873" y="780" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="researchView" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#8AB98C;fontSize=13;fontColor=#222222;" value="Research View
model outputs, explanations, metric comparison" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="210" x="873" y="620" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="outputsGroup" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#67508A;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#35254D;" value="Report-Ready<div>Outputs</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="220" width="250" x="150" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="recOutputs" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#A28CC3;fontSize=13;fontColor=#222222;" value="Recommendation CSVs and HTML Report" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="165" y="740" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="metricOutputs" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#A28CC3;fontSize=13;fontColor=#222222;" value="Evaluation Metrics

style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#333333;" value="Users" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="270" width="140" x="1150" y="600" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#777777;fontSize=14;fontColor=#222222;" value="Evaluator / Supervisor" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="112.5" x="1163.76" y="627.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edgeSourceData" edge="1" parent="1" source="sourceEvidence" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#7B1E31;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="dataGroup" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="220" y="120" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="226.75" y="480" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edgeResourceLoad" edge="1" parent="1" source="resourceData" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#555555;fontSize=12;" target="loadData" value="read metadata"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edgeSkillLoad" edge="1" parent="1" source="skillMap" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#555555;fontSize=12;" target="loadData" value="read requirements"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edgeProfileLoad" edge="1" parent="1" source="profiles" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#555555;fontSize=12;" target="loadData" value="read profile"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edgeLoadGap" edge="1" parent="1" source="loadData" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2D5D7B;" target="skillGap" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edgeGapModels" edge="1" parent="1" source="skillGap" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2D5D7B;fontSize=12;" target="models" value="skill gaps"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.5294" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edgeModelsStage" edge="1" parent="1" source="models" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2D5D7B;fontSize=12;" target="stagePath" value="ranked resources"> style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#3C7A3F;fontSize=12;" target="learnerView" value="display path"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edgeModelsResearch"
